calculation_notes: Baselines are hand-derived from ALGORITHMS.md; no generated tooling was used.

A mesh fabric lists each switch as its own plan entry, so the 2-switch mesh uses entries mesh-switch-a and mesh-switch-b (override_quantity 1 each). per_fabric_switch_counts.converged.server-leaf = 2.
Device count = mesh servers + mesh switches = 2 + 2 = 4.

Mesh cables (Algorithm 5, 2-switch mesh): cables_per_pair = total_logical_mesh_ports_per_switch. Each switch's mesh zone (port_range 33-36, no breakout) has 4 logical ports, so the single switch pair is wired with 4 mesh cables.
Server-to-switch cables: 2 servers x 1 unbundled single-port data connection = 2 cables.

BOM (Algorithm 6): mesh-server per unit = cx7-single-nic x1 and qsfp112-200g-xcvr x1 (1 NIC x 1 transceiver, recursed). Fleet = per_unit x plan_quantity(2). mesh-switch has no sub_components, so each switch entry contributes only itself.
